text: Bitcoin is flat and holding near $66k while Ethereum outpaces it with modest gains, suggesting selective strength in altcoins despite broad caution. Extreme Fear conditions (22) have eased slightly over the week, but $75B in daily volume remains subdued, indicating weak conviction on either side. Bitcoin's dominant 56.3% market share hints that capital is cautiously consolidating in the largest asset rather than rotating aggressively into alternatives.
